RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CHARLES SCHWAB & CO., INC.'s Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Finra-Dr Arbitration Award. Petitioner's unopposed "motion to confirm FINRA-DR arbitration award" is granted. Order and judgment are signed.
